description: Unique event identifier; not used as model feature.
Synthetic event timestamp; not counted among the 15 model features.
Hospital role of the accessing user; generated with Physician 28%, Nurse 26%, Admin 9%, Radiology 12%, LabTech 15%, Charge 10%.
Hospital department associated with the access event.
Interface or method used to access the EHR.
Authentication mode used for the access event.
Hour of event, 0-23, used to model diurnal access patterns.
Count of recent failed authentication/access attempts.
Synthetic hashed IP/signature bucket; not a real IP address.
Synthetic system response time in milliseconds.
Synthetic transferred data volume in kilobytes.
Binary anomaly label; 1=anomalous/high-risk, 0=normal. Exactly balanced at 50% for training signal.
